scripts.dev: concurrently --names engine,frontend --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "bun run dev:engine" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:binaries: bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/bin/devlens-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/bin/devlens-darwin-x64 && bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/bin/devlens-linux-x64 && bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/bin/devlens-linux-arm64 && bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/bin/devlens-windows-x64.exe
